name: sacred-six
description: Vanessa's Sacred Six — your blueprint and her knowledge base, inside Claude Desktop and Cowork.
long_description: Bring Vanessa's Sacred Six frameworks and course library into Claude Desktop and Cowork. Paste your personal connector URL from starseed-collective.com/learn/connect and the Sacred Six tools become available in your chats — kb_search, six_overview, and more, scoped to your membership.

connector_url.title: Your connector URL
connector_url.description: Paste your personal connector URL from starseed-collective.com/learn/connect. It looks like https://orchestrator.starseed-collective.com/mcp/m/… — keep it private, it's like a password.

tools.name: kb_fetch_chunk
tools.description: Fetch a full passage from a knowledge-base result

tools.name: kb_related_unowned
tools.description: Find related teaching you don't yet own

tools.name: six_overview
tools.description: Sacred Six blueprint overview and operating mode

tools.name: six_pillar_guide
tools.description: Vanessa's guide for a specific pillar

tools.name: six_launch_guide
tools.description: Launch guidance grounded in your blueprint
